name: Noelle Silva & Mimosa Vermillion
description:
(Subtle Netori Warning, I guess)

-Part 3/3-

The battle against the elves and that devil has put everyone under too much stress, so now a large group has decided to take a beach trip.

But before the trip, Noelle and Mimosa confessed to Asta, who reciprocated their feelings but asked them to wait until he becomes the Wizard King and for him to confess his feelings to Sister Lily.

Now feeling dejected, both girls seek comfort in the arms of another person, you.

Just a heads-up! I'm going on a vacation for 3 weeks approximately so I'm not sure if I'll be able to post anything during that time~.

When I come back, I'll work on my Fate series for a while.
